master.description: Shared truth baseline. Use this before starting or after finishing a focused lane.

notes: A1 owns master and final integration checkpoints.

A2.role: pull latest shared tooling and report runtime reality
notes: Start here to get Apollo Courier before switching to older feature branches.

parser-compat-v0.description: Offline parser migration and parity lane. No Discord connection, no parser mutation, no CoinFox.

A1.role: Core parser compatibility implementation and parity comparison
notes: This branch predates Courier on some clones; return to master for Courier updates.

A2.role: Legacy JSONL validation and private corpus parity evidence
notes: Run validation only against private legacy JSONL; do not connect Discord from Core.

courier-v0.description: Apollo Courier branch positioning and founder-private node communication.

A1.role: Courier integration and lane map ownership
notes: Keep Courier available from master so A2 can bootstrap with a normal pull.
Use lane-sync from master to move into older feature lanes when needed.
